name: code-quality-ship
description: Full code quality pass that auto-merges the PR when CI is green and the change is simple enough.

interface.shortDescription: Full code quality pass that auto-merges the PR when CI is green and the change is simple enough. Runs /msilvis:code-quality, then gates a sq
interface.longDescription: Full code quality pass that auto-merges the PR when CI is green and the change is simple enough. Runs /msilvis:code-quality, then gates a squash-merge on a strict simplicity checklist. Use when the user wants to ship a small PR end-to-end with one command.
